ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the venue is located */,
  "venue_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "venue_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "venue_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the venue */,
  "venue_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the venue */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Complete address of the venue */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the venue */,
  "venue_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the venue */,
  "venue_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the venue */,
  "venue_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_venue_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_type_id") REFERENCES venue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_venue_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_category_id") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "neighborhood_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "borough_area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "borough_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the borough */,
  "borough_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the venue category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the venue type */,
  "type_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue detail */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the detail belongs to */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the venue */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_features" TEXT /* Features of the venue (e.g., wheelchair accessible, free Wi-Fi) */,
  "venue_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_details_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, developer, community leader) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user within their organization */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the venue */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the venue was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the venue (1-5 scale) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "rating_useful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "rating_funny_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review funny */,
  "rating_cool_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review cool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_ratings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
